min_threshold_note: cutoff for player inclusion — in minutes (e.g. 24.0) or pct of 48 (e.g. 0.5)
feature_type_note: options: 'starter_ind' = binary 0/1 flag; 'pct' = continuous MIN/48 value in matrix
min_games_note: min qualified games (meeting min_threshold) for a player to appear in the matrix; 0 = no filter
min_total_games_note: players with this many total games are included regardless of minutes played per game
pace_adjustment_note: divide tm_PTS by estimated game pace (possessions/game) before regression; run research/pace_estimate.py first to generate data/team_season_pace.csv
season_notes: define years to import from nba.com
season_types_note: Available: Regular, Playoffs, Preseason, All-Star, PlayIn, IST
import_delays: increase to reduce failures, decrease to speed up
import_delays_note: pauses add randomness and wait time increase exponential per failure.
slow_fetch_threshold_note: increase wait time after NBA slows fetch speed.
skip_combos_note: list of {game_id, data_type} pairs to skip during game-level import
email_note: requires GMAIL_APP_PASSWORD env var — set one at myaccount.google.com/apppasswords
rapm_signal_threshold_note: min name_signal to include a player in RAPM validation (run automatically in gpm stage); see data/rapm_30y.csv — signal = cos_best / (cos_best + cos_2nd)
glm_note: kwargs passed directly to H2OGeneralizedLinearEstimator — null values are excluded. Docs: https://docs.h2o.ai/h2o/latest-stable/h2o-docs/data-science/glm.html
